div.p: c typedef struct block_header { uint32_t size; // Data area size uint8_t free; // 1=free, 0=allocated uint8_t magic; // 0xA1 or 0xF1 uint8_t _pad[2]; // Alignment struct block_header *next; // Free list link } block_header_t; // Total: 12 bytes

ul.li: Header is 12 bytes, data area follows immediately
To get header from pointer: hdr = ptr - 12
